---
title: "NASA POWER"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: DataAccessPlan, fetch, MetaData, NASAPower
using Dates, JSON
using GeoInterface.Extents: Extent
```

[NASA POWER](https://power.larc.nasa.gov/) provides global daily meteorological and solar energy
data (1981–present) at ~55 km resolution.  No API key is required.

```{julia}
MetaData(NASAPower())
```

## Point Query

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(NASAPower(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:T2M, :PRECTOTCORR])
plan
```

```{julia}
files = fetch(plan)
data = JSON.parsefile(files[1])
keys(data)
```

## Regional Query

NASA POWER supports regional bounding box queries (requires at least 2° in each dimension):

```{julia}
ext = Extent(X=(-76.0, -72.0), Y=(39.0, 42.0))

plan = DataAccessPlan(NASAPower(), ext,
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:T2M])
plan
```

## Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `T2M` | Temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `T2M_MAX` | Maximum temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `T2M_MIN` | Minimum temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `T2M_RANGE` | Temperature range at 2m (°C) |
| `T2MDEW` | Dew/frost point at 2m (°C) |
| `RH2M` | Relative humidity at 2m (%) |
| `PRECTOTCORR` | Precipitation corrected (mm/day) |
| `WS2M` | Wind speed at 2m (m/s) |
| `WS10M` | Wind speed at 10m (m/s) |
| `WD2M` | Wind direction at 2m (°) |
| `WD10M` | Wind direction at 10m (°) |
| `PS` | Surface pressure (kPa) |
| `QV2M` | Specific humidity at 2m (g/kg) |
| `CLOUD_AMT` | Cloud amount (%) |
| `ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN` | All-sky surface shortwave downward irradiance (MJ/m²/day) |
| `CLRSKY_SFC_SW_DWN` | Clear-sky surface shortwave downward irradiance (MJ/m²/day) |
| `ALLSKY_SFC_LW_DWN` | All-sky surface longwave downward irradiance (W/m²) |
